blended.narrative: Mont Orford is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,461 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
